message:
Add AGENTS.md support: hierarchical discovery + home-level instructions

- New module src/agents/project-doc.ts handles all AGENTS.md resolution
- Discovery algorithm: walk from project root (.git) to cwd, collect AGENTS.md files
- Home-level: ~/.config/sprout/AGENTS.md loaded as broadest scope
- AGENTS.override.md checked before AGENTS.md at every level
- Configurable: project root markers, fallback filenames, 32 KiB byte budget
- Content injected as <project-instructions> in system prompt, after environment
- Only loaded for top-level agent (not propagated to child agents)
- 13 unit tests for discovery and loading, 2 tests for prompt integration
